info.title: VibeLink HTTP API
info.description:
Local-first Agent Remote Console HTTP API.

All endpoints return JSON. Authentication via Bearer token.

Rate-limit headers: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Reset`.

get.description: Returns all registered tool definitions with input/output schemas.
Returns runtime configuration, security settings, devices, workspaces, and tasks.
Runs comprehensive health checks on the runtime environment.
Lists all built-in slash commands and discovered skills.
Runs Agent Reach version and doctor checks, returning channel availability and install paths.

post.description: Install or uninstall the Agent Reach skill into local agent skill directories.
Format raw platform output using Agent Reach formatters. Currently supports xhs.

input.description: Raw platform output as JSON value or JSON string

post.description: Transcribe an audio/video URL or local file using Agent Reach.

get.description: Checks the local extension bridge used by the Doubao web CLI.

post.description: Configure the Doubao extension-bridge CLI so an agent can handle '帮我配豆包' with one call.
Send a prompt to the logged-in Doubao web page through a local browser-control CLI.

get.description: Returns configured MCP server status and cached tool count.

post.description: Connects to configured MCP servers, reads tools/list metadata, and caches discovered tools.
Calls a configured MCP tool through the VibeLink runtime and records the result as a tool run.

get.description: Returns conversation history from Codex and Claude sessions.
Returns the full transcript and state of a specific history entry.

post.description: Create a new or resume an existing Codex/Claude agent task.

get.description: Returns a specific task with its events.
Returns a bounded task event replay window with pagination metadata.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Opaque event cursor returned as nextCursor

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next catch-up window

post.description: Run a non-interactive command in a workspace. Returns approval request for high-risk commands.
Start an interactive terminal session in a workspace.
Run a Git operation (stage, commit, pull, push, etc.).
Run a Git operation on a single changed file.
Create a permanent Git worktree for a workspace and register it as a new workspace.

branchName.description: Branch to create or attach to the worktree

baseRef.description: Base ref used when creating a new branch

title.description: Workspace title for the new worktree

path.description: Optional explicit worktree path; must be inside allowed roots

root.description: Optional explicit worktree root; must be inside allowed roots

get.description: Returns tool execution records.
Returns tool execution events with streaming support.

post.description: Delete old tool events. Supports dry-run to preview deletions.

get.description: Returns pending and historical approval requests.

post.description: Decide on a pending approval request.

get.description: Returns all paired devices.
Cross-table events from tasks, tool runs, and live calls.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Opaque replay cursor returned as nextCursor

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next replay window

post.description: Create a new live call session.

get.description: Returns a bounded live-call event replay window with pagination metadata.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Opaque event cursor returned as nextCursor

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next catch-up window

post.description: Patch server settings. Use ?dryRun=1 to preview changes.

get.description: Returns structured audit trail of all API operations.
Returns desktop observation snapshots.
Returns active and recent terminal sessions.
Returns Cloudflare Tunnel setup guidance.

after.description: Cursor for pagination (event ID or timestamp)

fields.description: Comma-separated field selector with dot notation
